description: Composition Blue and purple plaid checked full sleeves shirt with a hint of white, made of 100% cotton with a 100% cotton lining, full length buttoned placket with a mid-sleeve button, brand embroidery on the right shoulder with shoulder panels in fabric, two pockets on the chest, and a brand tab above the right pocket Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Warm iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks. Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
